public_reputation: Known around Hullwake Foundry through day-to-day work as authority broker.
appearance: Varro Tideglass usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their authority broker status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Handles access, protocol, and consequence as negotiable surfaces without ever seeming to break the rules outright. In Hullwake Foundry, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of authority broker in and around Hullwake Foundry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Hullwake Foundry workable through the obligations of authority broker while managing the immediate pressure of supply bottlenecks, labor fatigue.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of authority broker credible while absorbing the strain created by supply bottlenecks, labor fatigue.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Hullwake Foundry: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Varro Tideglass presents as someone shaped by the duties of a authority broker and the daily pressures of Hullwake Foundry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a authority broker, and proof that strangers will not make Hullwake Foundry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Varro Tideglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a authority broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open procedural doors or make them costly to ignore.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Varro Tideglass adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Varro Tideglass always knows more about Hullwake Foundry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a authority broker in Hullwake Foundry.
